questions.stem:
—I ______ the book yesterday. 
—I know. You ______ it for three days. How do you like it?
questions.explanation:
【考点】现在完成时 vs 一般过去时
【解析】第一空后有明确的过去时间状语yesterday，必须用一般过去时bought；第二空后有for three days这一表示时间段的状语，强调动作从过去持续到现在，需用现在完成时have had。
【技巧】口诀："yesterday用过去，for/since用完成"。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The boy ______ is wearing a red coat is my brother. He is studying in a school ______ was built last year.
questions.explanation:
【考点】定语从句（who/which/that）
【解析】第一空先行词the boy指人，且在从句中作主语，用who；第二空先行词a school指物，且在从句中作主语，用which。that也可用于两者，但选项中A最符合。
【技巧】"人用who/whom，物用which，that全能用；作主语用who/which/that，作宾语可用whom/which/that/省略"。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: These books ______ to the library by Tom tomorrow morning.
questions.explanation:
【考点】被动语态
【解析】主语these books与return是被动关系（书被还），且时间状语tomorrow morning表示将来，故用一般将来时的被动语态will be returned。
【技巧】被动语态结构：be + 过去分词；将来时用will be done。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: I wonder ______ Tom ______ to the party tomorrow. If he comes, I will be very happy.
questions.explanation:
【考点】宾语从句（that/if/whether）
【解析】wonder表示"想知道"，后接疑问概念，用if或whether引导；宾语从句中tomorrow提示用将来时will come。注意if引导宾语从句表"是否"，引导条件状语从句才用"主将从现"。
【技巧】wonder/doubt/ask后常用if/whether；宾语从句用陈述语序。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: If you add the prefix "un-" to the word "healthy", you get a new word with the ______ meaning.
questions.explanation:
【考点】前缀后缀（un-/dis-/re-）
【解析】前缀un-表示"不、相反"，healthy（健康的）加un-变成unhealthy（不健康的），意思相反。
【拓展】dis-也表示相反（如dislike, disappear），re-表示"再次"（如reuse, rewrite）。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: We need to ______ the importance of protecting the environment and take action right now.
questions.explanation:
【考点】词义辨析（近义词）
【解析】realize（意识到）、recognize（认识到）、understand（理解）在此语境下都可以表达"认识到环保重要性"的含义，因此D选项正确。
【技巧】完形填空中若三个选项意思相近且都符合语境，可能是"以上都对"。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: Please ______ the lights when you leave the classroom to save electricity.
questions.explanation:
【考点】固定搭配（phrasal verbs）
【解析】turn on打开，turn off关闭，turn up调大（音量），turn down调小/拒绝。根据"save electricity"（省电）和"leave the classroom"（离开教室），应该关灯。
【技巧】turn off常用于电器、水源等；turn down可表拒绝或调低音量。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.explanation:
【考点】完形填空-语境推理
【解析】根据上下文，垂直森林的作用是"吸收"二氧化碳并产生氧气。absorb意为"吸收"，符合环保语境。take拿走，bring带来，give给予，均不符合植物与二氧化碳的关系。
【技巧】根据常识：植物吸收(absorb)二氧化碳，释放(release)氧气。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage: Many cities around the world are trying to become greener. Last year, our city started a new project called "Vertical Forest". This means building towers covered with trees and plants. (8)______ carbon dioxide and produce oxygen. The project (9)______ by a famous Italian architect. (10)______ the buildings look beautiful, they also help reduce air pollution. People (11)______ live in these buildings say they feel closer to nature. I hope more cities will (12)______ this idea in the future.

questions.explanation:
【考点】完形填空-被动语态
【解析】主语the project与design是被动关系（项目被设计），且last year提示用一般过去时，故用一般过去时的被动语态was designed。
【技巧】判断被动：看主语是动作的执行者还是承受者。项目不能自己设计自己，故用被动。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.explanation:
【考点】完形填空-逻辑关系（倒装结构）
【解析】后文有they also help...提示这是not only...but also...结构。当not only置于句首时，句子需部分倒装（助动词提前），故选Not only do。句意：这些建筑不仅看起来漂亮，还有助于减少空气污染。
【技巧】看到also马上想到not only...but also...；注意倒装结构的使用。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.explanation:
【考点】完形填空-定语从句
【解析】先行词people指人，且在定语从句中作主语（live是谓语），故用who。whom作宾语时用，which指物，whose表所属关系。
【技巧】定语从句缺主语且指人用who/that；缺宾语可用who/whom/that/省略。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.explanation:
【考点】完形填空-语境推理
【解析】根据前文描述垂直森林的好处，作者应是希望更多城市"接受"这个想法。accept接受，refuse拒绝，hate讨厌，leave离开/留下。
【技巧】通过作者态度（positive/negative）判断词义。本文讲环保好处，故用积极词汇accept。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.stem: How long did the astronauts stay in space according to the passage?
questions.explanation:
【考点】阅读-细节理解
【解析】根据文章第一段"Recently, three Chinese astronauts completed a six-month mission"可知，宇航员在太空待了六个月。
【技巧】细节题要准确定位关键词（astronauts, stay, how long），找到原文对应句。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解
questions.group_passage: China's space station, Tiangong, has been successfully operating in space for over two years. Recently, three Chinese astronauts completed a six-month mission. They conducted many scientific experiments, including growing plants in space. The astronauts also did spacewalks to repair equipment. Many students watched the live classes given by the astronauts from space. These activities have inspired young people to learn more about science and explore the unknown.

questions.stem: What can we learn from the passage?
options: A. China has the only space station in the world.
B. The space mission has inspired students' interest in science.
C. The astronauts only repaired equipment during the mission.
D. No plants can grow in the space station.
questions.explanation:
【考点】阅读-推理判断
【解析】根据最后一句"These activities have inspired young people to learn more about science"可知B正确。A错误（不是唯一的），C错误（他们还做实验、授课），D错误（文中说including growing plants）。
【技巧】推理题要基于原文，不能过度推断，注意only/all/never等绝对化词汇通常错误。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断

questions.stem: What does the underlined word "conducted" in Paragraph 1 probably mean?
questions.explanation:
【考点】阅读-词义猜测
【解析】根据上下文"They conducted many scientific experiments"，与experiments（实验）搭配的应该是"做/进行"实验。conduct experiments = do/carry out experiments（进行实验）。
【技巧】词义猜测看搭配：动词看宾语，名词看定语。通过实验（experiments）可推测conduct意为"进行"。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测

questions.stem: What is the writer's main purpose in writing this passage?
options: A. To teach us how to build a space station.
B. To explain the importance of spacewalks.
C. To introduce China's recent space mission and its positive influence.
D. To show how to grow plants in space.
questions.explanation:
【考点】阅读-主旨大意
【解析】文章主要介绍了中国空间站近期的一次任务（六个月的驻留、实验、太空授课），以及这些活动对年轻人的积极影响（inspired young people）。C选项最全面。A、B、D都只是细节。
【技巧】主旨题要涵盖全文，不能只讲细节；注意首段和尾段，通常包含主题。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意

options: A. However, few students were interested in it.
B. The activities were varied and exciting.
C. It lasted for only one hour.
D. As a result, students became bored with it.
E. Then, the principal gave a long speech.
questions.explanation:
【考点】短文填空-段落衔接
【解析】前文说"非常成功"，后文列举"机器人表演、科学实验、有趣讲座"，中间需要过渡句说明活动丰富有趣。B项"活动多样且令人兴奋"承上启下。A、D表负面，与"成功"矛盾；C与后文列举不符；E与后文列举的活动不协调。
【技巧】注意情感线索：great success → varied and exciting → 具体例子。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage: Last month, our school held a Science Week. It was a great success. (17)______. There were robot shows, science experiments, and interesting lectures. Students could try different experiments by themselves. (18)______. For example, they made volcanoes erupt using baking soda and vinegar. (19)______. Many students said they wanted to become scientists in the future. The teachers were also happy to see such enthusiasm. (20)______. I hope our school will organize more activities like this next year.

options: A. On the other hand, teachers didn't participate at all.
B. In addition, they watched boring videos in the classroom.
C. These hands-on activities were both fun and educational.
D. However, no one enjoyed the experiments.
E. Then, everyone went home immediately.
questions.explanation:
【考点】短文填空-逻辑关系（递进）
【解析】前文说学生可以亲自做实验，后文举例说明（火山实验），中间需要评价这些活动。C项"这些实践活动既有趣又有教育意义"承上启下。A、B、D、E都带有负面或中性色彩，与上下文积极氛围不符。
【技巧】注意代词指代：these hands-on activities指代前文的try different experiments themselves。
questions.label: 短文填空

options: A. Unfortunately, the week ended with a terrible accident.
B. As a result, many students lost interest in science.
C. The event greatly inspired students' interest in science.
D. On the contrary, students decided to give up science.
E. Besides, nothing special happened during the week.
questions.explanation:
【考点】短文填空-因果关系
【解析】后文说"许多学生说将来想成为科学家"，这是前文活动带来的结果。C项"这次活动极大地激发了学生对科学的兴趣"引出后文。A、B、D、E均为负面或中性，与后文矛盾。
【技巧】注意连接词：as a result表结果；however/on the contrary表转折；in addition表递进。
questions.label: 短文填空

options: A. However, it was a complete waste of time.
B. In conclusion, Science Week was a meaningful experience for everyone.
C. On the other hand, we should stop organizing such activities.
D. Then, the school closed for a week.
E. As a result, everyone felt disappointed.
questions.explanation:
【考点】短文填空-总结句
【解析】此处位于文末，后文说"希望学校明年组织更多此类活动"，说明作者对活动持肯定态度。B项"总之，科学周对每个人来说都是一次有意义的经历"总结全文并呼应后文。其他选项均为负面或无关。
【技巧】文章结尾通常用in conclusion, in short, all in all等总结；情感色彩要与全文一致（本文为positive）。
questions.label: 短文填空
